name: Doodle Meeting Scheduling API
what_it_does: Meeting scheduling and availability coordination platform with REST API — enabling teams and event organizers to create time slot polls, collect availability from multiple participants, and schedule meetings without email back-and-forth, with integration for calendar apps (Google Calendar, Outlook, iCloud) and API access for programmatic poll creation and result retrieval.
use_cases: Creating meeting availability polls via Doodle API for automated team scheduling
Retrieving poll responses via Doodle API for scheduling decision automation
Booking meeting slots via Doodle Connect API for 1:1 meeting link generation
Integrating Doodle with CRM via API for customer meeting scheduling workflows
Managing team availability via Doodle API for event and workshop planning
not_for: Complex appointment booking with service/resource management (use Calendly or Acuity)
Healthcare appointment scheduling (use Mindbody or SimplePractice for clinical scheduling)
Real-time availability from calendar without poll step (use Calendly for direct booking)
best_when: A team needs to find a common meeting time across many participants — where Doodle's poll-based availability collection works better than back-and-forth email coordination, especially for groups of 5+ people.
avoid_when: You need direct one-step booking without a poll, service-based appointment scheduling, or clinical/medical scheduling.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow for third-party app integration. Bearer token authentication. Scoped access (read polls, write polls). No API key option for public API. No webhooks — must poll for responses. API v2 is current. Business API requires Doodle Business subscription.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: unlimited polls, basic features, Doodle branding
pricing.notes: Swiss company (Zurich). Founded 2006 by Michael Näf and Paul Sevinç. Acquired by Tamedia (Swiss media) 2014. 30M+ monthly users. 1B+ polls created. Market leader in group scheduling polls. Business features: admin controls, SSO, branded booking pages, 1:1 Connect links. Google Calendar, Outlook, iCloud, Microsoft 365 sync. Video conferencing links (Zoom, Teams, Meet). Used by: enterprise teams, event planners, consultants. API available for Business/Enterprise plans. Free plan for individual use. Very well-known brand in Europe and globally.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API v2 with OAuth2. No webhooks — must poll for responses. GDPR compliant. Swiss company. Business/Enterprise required for API. No API key option. Limited public API documentation.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Poll reads idempotent by poll ID. Participant reads idempotent. Poll creation not idempotent — check for existing before creating. Response submission may not be idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: No webhooks — must poll API to check for new responses (not suitable for real-time automation)
OAuth2 only — no simple API key; requires user authorization flow
API access requires Business or Enterprise subscription — not available on free plan
Swiss company under Swiss data protection law (strong privacy) and GDPR for EU
Connect (1:1 booking) is separate feature from group polls — different API endpoints
Poll sharing link and API ID are different — use API to get poll ID, not the shareable URL

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. Swiss company (strong privacy jurisdiction). OAuth2 with scopes. EU/CH data residency. Participant availability data (calendar availability) is sensitive. No webhooks (reduces attack surface). Tamedia (Swiss media) corporate ownership.
